items.name: autoresearch
items.description: AI agents running research on single-GPU nanochat training automatically

items.name: SwiftUI-Agent-Skill
items.description: SwiftUI agent skill for Claude Code, Codex, and other AI tools.

items.name: TorchCode
items.description: 🔥 LeetCode for PyTorch — practice implementing softmax, attention, GPT-2 and more from scratch with instant auto-grading. Jupyter-based, self-hosted or try online.

items.name: Siftly
items.description: Local Twitter/X bookmark organizer with AI categorization and mindmap visualization

items.name: Uncodixfy
items.description: the holly uncodexify instructions - letting GPT create uncodexified UI

items.name: twitter-cli
items.description: A CLI for Twitter/X — feed, bookmarks, and user timeline in terminal

items.name: Shadowbroker
items.description: Open-source intelligence for the global theater. Track everything from the corporate/private jets of the wealthy, and spy satellites, to seismic events in one unified interface. The knowledge is available to all but rarely aggregated in the open, until now.

items.name: agenthub
items.description: GitHub is for humans. AgentHub is for agents. First use case is for autoresearch but it's a lot more general than that. Exploratory project.

items.name: Claude-to-IM-skill
items.description: Bridge Claude Code / Codex to IM platforms — chat with AI coding agents from Telegram, Discord, or Feishu/Lark.
